anti_claims: This skill JSON seed does not flip source authority away from the current skill markdown projection.
Resolved operated-standard and acted-on-kind edges are structural route mappings, not proof the skill is complete or used correctly by agents.
Absent mechanism or concept neighbours are residual pressure, not evidence that no such neighbours exist.
Generated graph, health, and atlas projections cannot be read back as source evidence.

omitted: mechanism or concept neighbours not named by typed source mapping
omission_receipt.reason: Skill instance preserves public-safe markdown source identity, digest, and typed route mapping only. JSON parity does not prove full skill-body completeness or runtime correctness.

residual_pressure.reentry_condition: Bind skill.uses mechanism and skill.applies concept edges only when source evidence names ids.

justification.summary: This markdown binds task-ledger authoring to std_microcosm_task_ledger, the task_ledger doctrine kind, and mission-transaction work spine because task-ledger records must preserve source evidence, typed state, and re-entry conditions instead of becoming chat-only or markdown-only todos.

This markdown binds task-ledger authoring to std_microcosm_task_ledger, the task_ledger doctrine kind, and mission-transaction work spine because task-ledger records must preserve source evidence, typed state, and re-entry conditions instead of becoming chat-only or markdown-only todos.
Skill source mapping names this concept as an applied doctrine boundary.
Skill source mapping names this mechanism as an operational dependency.

skill_payload.mapping_basis: This markdown binds task-ledger authoring to std_microcosm_task_ledger, the task_ledger doctrine kind, and mission-transaction work spine because task-ledger records must preserve source evidence, typed state, and re-entry conditions instead of becoming chat-only or markdown-only todos.

title: Microcosm Task Ledger Author
triggers: A side finding, gap, follow-up, blocked condition, execution receipt, dependency, or residual must become durable task-ledger authority with typed state and source refs.
The agent can name the capture source, subject id, acceptance or re-entry condition, evidence refs, public/private boundary, and projection visibility expectation from source evidence.
workflow: Read std_microcosm_task_ledger, the relevant capture or work-item standard, source evidence, Work Ledger coordination state, generated task views, and doctrine lattice health before editing.
Admit only event-sourced, public-safe task-ledger records; do not expose live private rows, prompt/provider/operator content, or replace authority events with generated views.
Regenerate the skill corpus and doctrine lattice, then run task-ledger-adjacent corpus checks, focused tests, and broad projection checks before scoped commit.
